candidate_definition_hints.text: This repository contains a base networking framework for building any realtime multiplayer game on the web with Ably using the client/server architecture. This project uses vanilla JS on the client-side and NodeJS on the server-side and is scalable as you need

This starter kit allows you to add multiplayer functionality (that follows the [Client/Server strategy](https://www.gabrielgambetta.com/client-server-game-architecture.html)) to your game. It provides a communication framework so that your players can communicate with a central …

source_repo_description: This repository contains a base networking framework for building any realtime multiplayer game on the web with Ably using the client/server architecture. This project uses vanilla JS on the client-side and NodeJS on the server-side and is scalable as you need
